title: Watch and Accessory Holder
summary: Everyone needs a gift for dad this holiday season.
description: Everyone needs a gift for dad this holiday season. Men are notoriously difficult to shop for because we usually say we don't need anything. Guys are also notorious for just dropping their keys and wallet and watch all in a pile by the front door. This watch and accessory holder solves all this!

steps.title: Make Cuts
steps.body: Start by making all the cuts in the cut list.

steps.title: Route Dish
steps.body: Using a palm router, or a Kreg routing table, route out an accessories dish in the base. Mark 1" in from three sides of the base, then 4" in from the short side. Draw out your rectangle and route out the dish 1/4" deep. If not using a routing table, use a clamp on the Kreg Mobile Project Center to hold the base in place.

steps.title: Route Base Edge
steps.body: Clean up the outside edge of your base by rounding the edge with a palm router or routing table. Then sand the entire base.

steps.title: Cut Out Pegs
steps.body: Mark 1/2" in from either edge of the short side of each out peg, then draw 45 degree lines to the outside. Cut these corners off with a saw. Then sand smooth for a rounded point.

steps.title: Make Watch Racks
steps.body: Attach the up pegs to the back of the out pegs using pocket holes. Sand everything smooth.

steps.title: Attach Watch Racks to Base
steps.body: Attach each watch rack to the base using pocket holes. Space the first one an inch in from the edge on the opposite side from the accessories dish, then space the second one and inch from the first.

steps.title: Add Pocket Hole Plugs
steps.body: Put a drop of wood glue into each hole, then add pocket hole plugs. Let dry, then saw smooth with a flush trim saw. (You may have to do two holes on each watch rack, then do the other two after you've sawn off the first two since the holes are close together.)

steps.title: Oil or Stain
steps.body: Add a wood mineral oil or stain to the watch and accessories holder according to the tastes of the person you're gifting this beautiful project to!

steps.title: Visit www.CharlestonCrafted.com
steps.body: Check out www.CharlestonCrafted.com for more simple woodworking projects and great gift ideas for the holidays!
